playbook.intent: Pick the next product by mining an audience you already own (or are growing), not by guessing market need.
playbook.scope: Pick the next product by mining an audience you already own (or are growing), not by guessing market need. Done = signed waitlist + paying pre-orders before line 1 of code.

success-criteria.criterion: Final stage decision-gate is met and committed in writing
Every stage produces its named outputs
Cycle closes only when a written commitment exists for the next step

stage.name: Mine the audience
stage.intent: Pull demand straight from your own people.

tasks.task: Read 100 recent replies, DMs, support tickets

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when one theme has >=10 distinct demand signals.

stage.name: Frame the bet
stage.intent: Write a one-liner the audience will repeat.

tasks.task: Write the bet as a tweet-length one-liner
Test it in a private DM round

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when 3 friends can repeat the one-liner.

stage.name: Public hypothesis tweet
stage.intent: Float the bet publicly to widen signal.

tasks.task: Post the bet as a hypothesis tweet
Track replies, follows, and likes by ICP

stage.name: Pre-sell page
stage.decision-gate: Advance only with >=3 paid pre-orders in 7 days.

stage.name: Waitlist + cohort plan
stage.intent: Convert the spike into a launch cohort.

tasks.task: Open a free waitlist alongside paid pre-orders
Plan a small cohort launch window

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when waitlist + paid pre-orders combine to a viable first cohort.

stage.name: Build OR refund decision
stage.intent: Use the pre-order data to commit.
stage.decision-gate: Cycle closes when decision is communicated.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content distribution-first-idea-validation-audience-before-product --format md, agent: faion get-content distribution-first-idea-validation-audience-before-product --format context, json: faion get-content distribution-first-idea-validation-audience-before-product --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial v2 draft generated from F-059..063 backlog}]
